mapper.select: SELECT binding_id AS id, widget_id AS widgetId, axis, column_name AS columnName, alias, aggregate_fn AS aggregateFn, sort_order AS sortOrder FROM ib_widget_binding WHERE widget_id = #{widgetId} ORDER BY sort_order, binding_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ib_widget_binding (widget_id, axis, column_name, alias, aggregate_fn, sort_order) VALUES (#{widgetId}, #{axis}, #{columnName}, #{alias}, #{aggregateFn}, #{sortOrder})
